name: Sausage Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown sausages until cooked through.
2. Drain and cut the sausages into small pieces.
3. Place the pieces in the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Sprinkle with shredded cheese.
5. In a mixing bowl, beat eggs.
6. Add cream and nutmeg to the beaten eggs.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 55-60 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
